title: Phantom Log Destination Type
description: Schema for a single log-destination type manifest. v0.17.0+. Each type ships as bundles/spark/destinations/<id>/spec.yaml.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Pinned at 1 in v0.17.0.

id.description: URL-safe slug, unique. Matches the directory name on disk.

name.description: Display name shown in the UI (e.g. 'Syslog', 'HTTP Webhook').

description.description: One-paragraph operator-facing description of this destination type.

category.description: Grouping label for the UI dropdown (e.g. 'On-prem SIEM', 'Cloud SIEM', 'Webhook', 'Notification').

iconColor.description: CSS color for the icon glyph (e.g. '#a7c8ff').

iconBg.description: CSS color for the icon background (e.g. 'rgba(167, 200, 255, 0.15)').

fields.description: Ordered list of configuration fields. Extends ConfigParam (mcp/agent/app/connectors/page.tsx) with the optional visible_when clause.

handler.description: Python module path for the type's probe() + send() implementation, e.g. 'bundles.spark.destinations.syslog.handler'.

probe.description: Optional probe-behavior hints. Reserved for future per-type tuning.

send_test_message.description: Whether probe() sends a real test message (true) or connectivity-only (false).

Field.description: One configuration field. Mirrors the ConfigParam union in the UI's connector page, plus an optional visible_when clause for conditional rendering (e.g. webhook auth-type discriminator).

name.description: Field name (snake_case). Used as the JSON key in the destination's config_json or secret slot name.

display.description: Display label shown above the input.

type.description: Widget type. Matches the ConfigParam.type union in the UI.

required.description: True when the operator must supply a value.

defaultValue.description: Default rendered into the input (as a string; widget interprets per type).

description.description: Inline hint shown under the input.

options.description: Required when type is select/radio/multi_select. The set of allowed values.

visible_when.description: Optional conditional visibility. The field renders only when the referenced sibling field's current value matches.

field.description: Name of a sibling field (must be a select/radio in this manifest).

value.description: Value (string) or values (array of strings) that make this field visible.
